_description: GWR Pipeline Configuration Template. Copy and customize for your project.

field_mapping._doc: Explicit field names for your datasets. Scripts auto-detect using these as fallback.

poi_classification._note: Optional. Reclassify POIs by time-of-day operation.

dasymetric._note: Optional. Allocate census population to building footprints by height.
dasymetric._field_comment: Leave null to use field_mapping.population_count / building_elevation

grid._note: Create fishnet grid + join population, POI, road density indicators.
grid._poi_fc_comment: If null, uses result from step 1 (poi_all_time_classified in GDB)
grid._fields_comment: Leave null to use field_mapping.population_count / road_length

gwr._doc: Dependent var = facility density (poi_count). Explanatory vars = built-environment indicators.
gwr._grid_active_comment: If null, uses grid_active_cells from step 3
gwr._num_neighbors_comment: Only used with USER_DEFINED selection method

prediction._note: Predict future facility distribution using fitted GWR model.

network._note: Optional. Pedestrian flow assignment + gap detection.
network._fields_comment: Leave null to use field_mapping defaults
